name: Chicken Tortilla Wraps
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Wrap tortillas in foil and heat in the oven for 10-15 minutes or until warm.
3. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray and place over medium-high heat.
4. Add chicken, onion, and garlic to the skillet and sauté until the chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 4-6 minutes.
5. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
6. Divide the chicken mixture among tortillas. Top each with lettuce and tomato.
7. Drizzle each wrap with 2-3 tablespoons of dressing.
8. Roll up the tortillas and serve.
